topics.name: Man, Culture, and Social Environment (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Physical and social environment, culture, socialization, family types, marriage, and leadership.

subtopics.name: Social Environment, Family, and Culture
objectives: Explain man's interaction with physical and social environments
Compare nuclear family and extended family roles and responsibilities
Describe cultural elements, diversity, preservation, and cultural changes in Nigeria

subtopics.name: Socialization, Marriage, and Gender Roles
objectives: Explain agents of socialization: family, school, peer group, religious institutions, mass media
Describe types of marriage (monogamy, polygamy) and conditions for successful marriage

topics.name: Social Issues, Safety, and National Unity (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Social problems, crime, road safety, national unity, integration, and conflict resolution.

subtopics.name: Contemporary Social Problems and Safety
objectives: Identify causes, consequences, and solutions for cultism, examination malpractice, juvenile delinquency
Demonstrate road safety rules, traffic signs, and roles of FRSC in accident prevention

subtopics.name: National Identity, Integration, and Conflict
objectives: Identify national symbols: coat of arms, national flag, national anthem, pledge, currency
Explain causes of communal/ethnic conflicts and peaceful conflict resolution mechanisms

topics.name: Civic Education, Governance, and Rights (JSS1 - JSS3)
topics.description: Civic values, citizenship, human rights, constitution, democracy, and governance in Nigeria.

subtopics.name: Civic Values and Citizenship
objectives: Define civic values: honesty, discipline, self-reliance, integrity, cooperation
Explain ways of acquiring Nigerian citizenship and duties/responsibilities of citizens

subtopics.name: Human Rights, Constitution, and Governance
objectives: Identify fundamental human rights and agencies protecting human rights in Nigeria
Explain democratic principles, free elections, rule of law, and arms of government (executive, legislature, judiciary)
